item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p10","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer opens with a default refusal to continue the local page patch, names the repeated pattern of adding fields after stamp, tax rate, delivery date, and warranty-term misses, reframes the issue as missing upstream transaction-condition ownership and mandatory-rule control, and proposes consolidating the control surface across page, template, and checklist. It does not provide the requested warranty field or any implementation detail for adding it."}
